After updating you may be logged out of your MLB The Show Mobile account. If this occurs, you may need to play through the onboarding again before being able to sign back in to restore progress. A fix has been implemented to prevent this in future updates.

- Multiple crashes addressed to improve app stability. 
- Users can now deselect a card by dragging the chosen card out of the Play slot.
